query:
SELECT b.id, b.title, LEFT(b.description, 80) AS desc_preview, p.date_iso
FROM scheduleBlocks b JOIN dailyPlans p ON p.id = b.planId
WHERE (LOWER(b.title) LIKE '%planet%' OR LOWER(b.description) LIKE '%planet%')
  AND p.date_iso >= '2026-04-01'
ORDER BY p.date_iso DESC, b.sortOrder
LIMIT 20;
